text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon's passionate effort in the race
leaves many of the spectators in shock.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Well, that was something! Did you see how
Bourbon ran?! She blew me away!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
She was definitely amazing, but do you think
she'll be able to keep this up in longer races?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I'm convinced! I can see her running with that kind
of speed for 2,000 meters or even more!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Make no mistake, Bourbon's got it in her to be a
star player in next year's Classics! She's got what
it takes to aim for the Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That was incredible, Bourbon...

If nothing else, the race ends up causing many
people to acknowledge Mihono Bourbon's dream.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I'm back, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. However, it is unclear
whether or not I successfully changed the public's
perception of me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I did not hear words that clearly expressed a shift
in opinion.

At the very least, the people around me were
stunned by Mihono Bourbon's running. I relay all
the details to her.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Status—"shock." I suppose there was a marked
change in the crowd's atmosphere.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I believe I have successfully achieved
our objective today. Ready for your next order,
Trainer.

Since we'll be tackling the Classics next year, we
need to hit another milestone first.

The Spring Stakes will serve as the perfect test to
see whether Bourbon has what it takes for the
Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. Browsing data... The Spring
Stakes has a distance of 1,800 meters.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I surmise that I must enhance my stamina even
further.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I wish to train after returning home
today.
I respond to her enthusiasm with a vigorous nod.

As I'm waiting for Mihono Bourbon by the
racecourse entrance to return home...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon was so great... Now, no one's talking bad
about her.
A lone Umamusume emerges.

It's Rice Shower—a kind, reserved runner in the
same year as Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I can't keep being afraid... I've made up my mind!
I'm going to do my best too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll work super hard in the Twinkle Series, and I'll
change...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll become a new-and-improved Rice Shower
who'll make everyone smile!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Did you just call my name? Is there something you
require?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-B-Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah, ah, um... uhhh... It's... just...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You were... really amazing in today's race!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. That's very kind of you to
say.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, uh, that's, I...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: W-well, see you later!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...?
I wonder why she was so flustered.

In any case, the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes ends
without a hitch.

Now we set our sights on the next race—the
Spring Stakes—and resume our daily training!
